description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build that runs in the default build stage using the Docker image registry.centos.org/minishift/minishift-build:latest. The job should export CURRENT_BUILD_PATH, set up a GOPATH in $HOME/gopath, download and install dep v0.4.1 to $HOME/gopath/bin, add it to PATH, create the Go workspace src/github.com/minishift directory, symlink the current repository into that path, then cd into it and run make prerelease, remove the generated bindata directory, and move the output to the public directory for artifact publishing. The job must publish the public directory as an artifact and has no caches, services, or conditional rules.
